'''鈭歞-zh-h''' ('''dazhaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rub|rub]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rub|rub]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-zh-h
|-
! Lemma
| dazhaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dazhahithi|dazhahithi]] || [[word:dazhahiji|dazhahiji]] || [[word:dazhahishi|dazhahishi]] || [[word:dazhahi|dazhahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhahuthuth|dazhahuthuth]] || [[word:dazhahujuj|dazhahujuj]] || [[word:dazhahushush|dazhahushush]] || [[word:dazhah|dazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhahuthu|dazhahuthu]] || [[word:dazhahuju|dazhahuju]] || [[word:dazhahushu|dazhahushu]] || [[word:dazhahu|dazhahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhahufuth|dazhahufuth]] || [[word:dazhahufuj|dazhahufuj]] || [[word:dazhahufush|dazhahufush]] || [[word:dazhahuf|dazhahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dazhahethe|dazhahethe]] || [[word:dazhaheje|dazhaheje]] || [[word:dazhaheshe|dazhaheshe]] || [[word:dazhahe|dazhahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhahothoth|dazhahothoth]] || [[word:dazhahojoj|dazhahojoj]] || [[word:dazhahoshosh|dazhahoshosh]] || [[word:dazhah|dazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhahotho|dazhahotho]] || [[word:dazhahojo|dazhahojo]] || [[word:dazhahosho|dazhahosho]] || [[word:dazhaho|dazhaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhahofoth|dazhahofoth]] || [[word:dazhahofoj|dazhahofoj]] || [[word:dazhahofosh|dazhahofosh]] || [[word:dazhahof|dazhahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dazhah忙th忙|dazhah忙th忙]] || [[word:dazhah忙j忙|dazhah忙j忙]] || [[word:dazhah忙sh忙|dazhah忙sh忙]] || [[word:dazhah忙|dazhah忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhahathath|dazhahathath]] || [[word:dazhahajaj|dazhahajaj]] || [[word:dazhahashash|dazhahashash]] || [[word:dazhah|dazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhahatha|dazhahatha]] || [[word:dazhahaja|dazhahaja]] || [[word:dazhahasha|dazhahasha]] || [[word:dazhaha|dazhaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhahafath|dazhahafath]] || [[word:dazhahafaj|dazhahafaj]] || [[word:dazhahafash|dazhahafash]] || [[word:dazhahaf|dazhahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dazhahasha|dazhahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godazhahasha|godazhahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidazhahasha|gokidazhahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dazhahn眉sha|dazhahn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godazhahnkn眉sha|godazhahnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidazhahn眉sha|gokidazhahn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dazhahsh毛sha|dazhahsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godazhahnksh毛sha|godazhahnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidazhahsh毛sha|gokidazhahsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dazhahrosha|dazhahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godazhahnkrosha|godazhahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidazhahrosha|gokidazhahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhahmusha|dazhahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godazhahnkmusha|godazhahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhahmusha|gokidazhahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dazhahsherasha|dazhahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godazhahnksherasha|godazhahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidazhahsherasha|gokidazhahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dazhahngasha|dazhahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godazhahnkngasha|godazhahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidazhahngasha|gokidazhahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dazhahyasha|dazhahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godazhahnkyasha|godazhahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidazhahyasha|gokidazhahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dazhahyamasha|dazhahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godazhahnkyamasha|godazhahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidazhahyamasha|gokidazhahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dazhahn眉sh毛sha|dazhahn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godazhahnkn眉sh毛sha|godazhahnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidazhahn眉sh毛sha|gokidazhahn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dazhahn眉rosha|dazhahn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godazhahnkn眉rosha|godazhahnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidazhahn眉rosha|gokidazhahn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhahn眉musha|dazhahn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godazhahnkn眉musha|godazhahnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhahn眉musha|gokidazhahn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dazhahsh毛n眉sha|dazhahsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godazhahnksh毛n眉sha|godazhahnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidazhahsh毛n眉sha|gokidazhahsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dazhahsh毛rosha|dazhahsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godazhahnksh毛rosha|godazhahnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidazhahsh毛rosha|gokidazhahsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhahsh毛musha|dazhahsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godazhahnksh毛musha|godazhahnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhahsh毛musha|gokidazhahsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dazhahron眉sha|dazhahron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godazhahnkron眉sha|godazhahnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidazhahron眉sha|gokidazhahron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dazhahrosh毛sha|dazhahrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godazhahnkrosh毛sha|godazhahnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidazhahrosh毛sha|gokidazhahrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhahromusha|dazhahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godazhahnkromusha|godazhahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhahromusha|gokidazhahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dazhahmun眉sha|dazhahmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godazhahnkmun眉sha|godazhahnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidazhahmun眉sha|gokidazhahmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dazhahmush毛sha|dazhahmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godazhahnkmush毛sha|godazhahnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidazhahmush毛sha|gokidazhahmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dazhahmurosha|dazhahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godazhahnkmurosha|godazhahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidazhahmurosha|gokidazhahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dazhah|dazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:d忙zh忙h|d忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodazhah|hodazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hod忙zh忙h|hod忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodazhah|hohodazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohod忙zh忙h|hohod忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dazhah|n眉dazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉d忙zh忙h|n眉d忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dazhah|n眉n眉dazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉d忙zh忙h|n眉n眉d忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dazhah|n茂dazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂d忙zh忙h|n茂d忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dazhah|n茂n茂dazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂d忙zh忙h|n茂n茂d忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludazhah|ludazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lud忙zh忙h|lud忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludazhah|luludazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulud忙zh忙h|lulud忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidazhah|lidazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lid忙zh忙h|lid忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidazhah|lilidazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilid忙zh忙h|lilid忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodazhah|kodazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kod忙zh忙h|kod忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodazhah|kokodazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokod忙zh忙h|kokod忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedazhah|kedazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ked忙zh忙h|ked忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedazhah|kekedazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keked忙zh忙h|keked忙zh忙h]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
